remaining_params.SpellDescription: Target creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it gains trample and lifelink until end of turn.
remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature with a +1/+1 counter on it

params.Description: As long as you've put one or more +1/+1 counters on a creature this turn, CARDNAME has trample and lifelink.
